The function should take 3 arguments, i.e., - post_title: str, the title or main topic of the forum post, - post_body: str, the main body or content of the forum post, - bullet_points: list(str), a collection of user-provided discussion points or options in markdown format. The function should return Returns a string containing the fully formatted and sanitized HTML representation of the forum post, including the header, message body, and safely rendered discussion points.     {header}

    {message}

Output the code in a markdown code block, i.e., between triple backticks (```) with the language specified as Python.     • Mushrooms
    • Extra Cheese
    " }
